title: Croptopia Delight
description: This mod adds the integration of Croptopia recipes with Farmer's Delight and their addons.
body:
Croptopia Delight is an addon for Farmer's Delight with integration Farmer's Delight and Croptopia. Mod adds the integration of Croptopia recipes with Farmer's Delight and their addons. DOWNLOAD CROPTOPIA FROM CURSEFORGE: [link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia) Have questions? Join our Discord and ask [Discord link](https://discord.gg/M4XttfXXDw) CurseForge version - [Click me!](https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/croptopia-delight)
